--- with_group_hint.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
WITH 1 AS x
GROUP @{GROUP_METHOD=STREAM_GROUP} BY x
RETURN x

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLWith{
            With:  15,
            Items: []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                  ValuePos: 20,
                  ValueEnd: 21,
                  Base:     10,
                  Value:    "1",
                },
                Alias: &ast.AsAlias{
                  As:    22,
                  Alias: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 25,
                    NameEnd: 26,
                    Name:    "x",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
            GroupBy: &ast.GroupBy{
              Group: 27,
              Hint:  &ast.Hint{
                Atmark:  33,
                Rbrace:  60,
                Records: []*ast.HintRecord{
                  &ast.HintRecord{
                    Key: &ast.Path{
                      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                        &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 35,
                          NameEnd: 47,
                          Name:    "GROUP_METHOD",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                    Value: &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 48,
                      NameEnd: 60,
                      Name:    "STREAM_GROUP",
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
              Exprs: []ast.Expr{
                &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 65,
                  NameEnd: 66,
                  Name:    "x",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 67,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 74,
                  NameEnd: 75,
                  Name:    "x",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph WITH 1 AS x GROUP @{GROUP_METHOD=STREAM_GROUP} BY x RETURN x
